response.justification: While Bogdan is an accomplished senior engineer with 14+ years of experience meeting the educational requirements, the resume shows expertise entirely in application and web development (TypeScript, Node.js, full-stack systems). The Principal Performance Architect role requires specialized hardware design and chip optimization skills—SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture analysis, and deep neural network inference optimization—none of which appear in his background. The gap between application-layer optimization and hardware-level performance architecture is too substantial for this principal-level position.
strengths: Exceeds seniority requirement with 14+ years of professional software engineering experience at senior and staff levels
Demonstrated expertise in low-latency systems optimization (async I/O, caching, high-performance databases at Dunnhumby)
Recent exposure to AI infrastructure and emerging interest in ML/AI workload optimization in current role
concerns: Zero evidence of SoC/IP modeling, hardware design, or digital design experience—core requirement for the role
Career is entirely in application and web development; no background in GPU architecture, chip design, or semiconductor optimization
Current AI infrastructure work is at framework/tooling level, not performance analysis or optimization of neural network training/inference workloads
